ftbquests.modpack.title: &6Flesh & Steel&r &cInvasion&r &ev2.7.2&r
ftbquests.chapter.0.quest1.description1: The End, also known as the End dimension, is a barren, empty plain. This dimension is home to a large number of Endermen (spawning more frequently than in the Overworld) and an Ender Dragon. You will engage in a life-or-death battle with the Ender Dragon here, so be fully prepared.
ftbquests.chapter.0.quest1.description3: 1. Find the lucky blocks on the map
ftbquests.chapter.0.quest1.description4: 2. Locate the Obsidian Towers and End Cities on the outer islands
ftbquests.chapter.0.quest7.description1: Can be found in End City chests
ftbquests.chapter.0.title: The End [&a30~50&r,&e2&r]
ftbquests.chapter.053F419E3E08847C.quest: Click to jump to the dependencies quest:

This is a forest world shrouded in eternal night. Here, you can see intricate dark mazes, monster-filled rich mines, bottomless canyons, towering spires, aurora palaces in glaciers, massive caves inhabited by giant dragons, and various novel terrains and new dungeons waiting for you to explore.
1. Find the lucky blocks on the map
Dig down to the bedrock in the Twilight Forest, stand on it for about a minute, and you will slowly be swallowed by darkness, eventually reaching the Void dimension.
ftbquests.chapter.053F419E3E08847C.title: Twilight Forest [&c120~150&r,&e64&r]
ftbquests.chapter.0C80A5748A662C54.quest: Click to jump to the dependencies quest:

The Shadowlands dimension is a dark shadowy realm. Dungeons made of gray trees and blackstone are the main features here, and occasionally you can see Red Cactus Forests. In this space, you can find keys to the Glowshroom Forest dimension and the Vellium dimension.
landscapes, with occasional Red Cactus Forests. Within this space, you can find keys leading to the Glowshroom Forest dimension and the Vellium dimension.
Survival goals:
1. Find the lucky blocks on the map
2. Find the Golden Cube
3. Find the large lucky block structure
4. Find the key to the Vellium dimension
CLICK HERE
&cRequires completion of dependencies quest&r
Delve into the Shadowlands
{block.shadowlands.shadowmetal_enhancer}
&cRequires completion of dependencies quest&r
Breaking loot blocks in dungeons will randomly drop Void armor. Your goal is to collect a complete set.
Source: Obtained by mining Shadow Steel Ore
Distribution: Usually found between layers 0~255
Find a tall tower structure with a lavender portal frame on top. The portal igniter can be found in nearby chests.
Equip a full set of Void traveler armor and right-click the Ender Altar to obtain the Glowshroom Forest portal igniter.
Source: Obtained by mining Jade Ore
Distribution: Usually found between layers 0~255
Source: Obtained by mining Ruby Ore
Distribution: Usually found between layers 0~255
Explore and Discover
Golden Cubes usually spawn in Void Woods. Killing a Golden Cube has a chance to drop a Void Orb, and you can find and activate the Ender Altar to summon the boss Ender Star.
Search in the overgrown woods.
You need to find a large 2-story dungeon with a Void Gate in the Shadowlands. The walls of this dungeon are indestructible.
Large Shadow Dungeon
ftbquests.chapter.0C80A5748A662C54.title: Shadowlands [&650~70&r,&e4&r]
ftbquests.chapter.0E658DFD921E1C61.quest: There may be some conflicts. It is recommended not to use shaders during invasions.
Shader Compatibility
AI Enhancements:
·Zombies can dig, use fishing rods to catch players, and rarely catch items
·Spiders can spit webs to attack players
·Creepers can explode through walls and have a chance to launch themselves at players
·Skeletons have increased accuracy and will flee when players get close
·Blazes can fire multiple fireballs in quick succession
·Ghasts can fire multiple fireballs in quick succession
·All mobs have a chance to ride phantoms to approach players at high places and throw ender pearls to chase players
And more...
PVP Master
Monster Mechanics

Lucky Blocks are blocks that can yield various items or events. You can use different materials to increase or decrease luck (also applicable to lucky weapons) to change the probability of good or bad events.
Common gameplays:
1. Map Competition: (Requires priority map customization)
Multiple players race in a lucky block map, and finally engage in PVP to see who survives last.
2. Skyblock Survival: (Requires an infinite source of lucky blocks)
Players start on a resource-scarce skyblock and obtain resources through lucky blocks to eventually complete the game.
3. Normal Survival: (Lucky blocks generated randomly through quests or maps)
Players obtain lucky blocks through exploration to get various rare items to aid survival or increase challenges.
One of the features
About Lucky Blocks
Invasion types:
Major Invasion, Minor Invasion, Super Invasion, and Nightmare Invasion

Invasions can occur both day and night. When an invasion happens, it is mainly a Major Invasion, followed by various Minor Invasions as the severity increases. During invasions, a certain number of invasion mobs with red borders (&cSuper Enhanced&r) or purple borders (&5Nightmare Enhanced&r) will spawn based on severity. Super Invasions generally have higher severity and spawn a large number of Super Enhanced mobs. Nightmare Invasions are the most difficult with the highest severity, spawning a large number of Nightmare Enhanced mobs.
You can check current invasion information in the chat box. As days pass, higher-level or rarer invasions will occur.

The first invasion will occur after &e5&r days (night invasion). Subsequent invasions will occur at certain intervals, either day or night (unlucky ones may last the entire day). &cYou cannot sleep during an invasion&r. Invasions will automatically end after a certain period of time. Killing &e100&r invasion-generated mobs can end the current invasion. Different dimensions have different invasion cycles and types.
Second feature
Invasion Mechanics
·The difficulty value is displayed in the lower right corner by default, starting at 0, with a natural maximum of 250. Using items can increase it to 9999.
·The difficulty value will automatically decrease upon death
·The higher the difficulty value, the higher the mob attributes and better their equipment.
·The difficulty value is also related to dimensions. You cannot enter a dimension without reaching the specified difficulty, and different dimensions have different natural maximum limits.
Block Universe dimension display explanation:
Dimension Name [&bMinimum Entry Difficulty~Natural Maximum Difficulty&r,&eLucky Shield Level&r]
How to increase difficulty value:
·Increases over time in the corresponding dimension, averaging 0.5 per day
·Using [{item.kubejs.bad_apple}]
How to decrease difficulty value:
Difficulty displayed in the lower right corner
Difficulty Value
When a player mines a Lucky Block with Silk Touch (each level +&e10&r% chance), an event will be triggered.

After an event is triggered, it will enter a queue on the left side of the screen. When the countdown ends, a random player on the server will be selected to trigger the event, then the next queued event will start its countdown. Only one type of Lucky Block event can be queued at a time.
Displayed on the left when triggered
About Lucky Block Events

Lucky Blocks are a luck-based survival challenge that can adapt to various playstyles with no fixed. You can also use the included maps for mini-games. Here, only some key points are explained to reduce exploration time for new players.
1. Find a reliable shelter. Don't use your common sense—monsters are very smart
2. Increase your maximum health through food
3. Obtain materials for making guns through {block.lucky.lucky_block} or mining
4. Obtain important items and enchantments through villager trading
5. Forge your deified equipment
6. Make money
Mid-game:
1. Obtain level 100 enchantments through {block.lucky.water_lucky_block} and {block.lucky.pink_lucky_block}
2. Obtain Lucky Block merchants and more through {block.lucky.flesh_and_steel_lucky_block}
3. Dimension adventures, go to a higher difficulty dimension and increase the difficulty value.

The main storyline of the quest book is the [Block Universe] chapter group. The first step to open the quest chapter is to find the quest pointed to by the red arrow, determine the primary survival goal, then check the dimension quests for the next difficulty as the advanced goal.
4. You won't encounter the Ender Dragon directly in the End. You can survive outside and don't need to defeat it immediately
5. Continue upgrading deified equipment
6. Try challenging some bosses
7. Make more money++
Late-game:
1. Craft {block.lucky.strange_lucky_block} to unlock the sale of {item.kubejs.challenge_badge} in the store
2. Defeat all bosses and the [&dFinal Boss&r] Ender Dragon?
3. Complete the challenge chapter group
How to start the included skyblock or competition map mode of the mod pack:
New World -> World -> World Type: Skyblock -> Customize -> Select a template -> Done
Main template explanations:
default: Default skyblock, not recommended
lucky_block_racing: Competition map, adapted for 5 players' tracks
one_barrel: Single barrel skyblock, with some starting items in the barrel
Early game:
What is the goal
Overall Process and Gameplay

&eLucky Shield&r is an effect that can restore damage absorption. Each level adds 5 absorption points, and also increases armor value and toughness by 1%, plus 1% gun damage reduction (100% gun damage immunity at level 100).
Mobs in different dimensions will spawn with different levels of Lucky Shield.
How to break it:
Attack with weapons from Lucky Blocks that have luck value.
Why can't I damage mobs
Lucky Shield Mechanism
The game supports voice chat, but be careful not to let monsters hear your voice.
Gunshots will also attract monsters.
Keep your voice down
About Sound
Open large map: M
Lock inventory slot: Hold C and left-click an item in the inventory to lock it, click again to unlock
Gun accessory modification: Hold the gun and press Z
Gun melee attack: Hold the gun and press V. Some pure melee guns can attack directly with left-click
Open waypoints: U
Open backpack (if available): B
Open wireless terminal (if available): I
Hold alt (with prompt) when opening the gun workbench while holding a gun to click [F] in the upper left corner to filter accessories and ammunition usable for the current gun
Tool tip scrolling: Use the mouse wheel to scroll up and down long tooltips, or use arrow keys to adjust
Others can be viewed or modified in key bindings
Common Key Bindings

ftbquests.chapter.0EE09E3CE63A750E.quest: Here are some relatively special or rare items, serving as a late-game goal.
Normal totems do not work against void damage.

Adult axolotls can be bred by feeding tropical fish buckets. If both parents are not blue variants, there is a 1/1200 (approximately 0.083%) chance that the baby axolotl will mutate into the rare blue variant.
ftbquests.chapter.0EE09E3CE63A750E.title: Collector
ftbquests.chapter.10C0ECB494069482.quest: You need to find an Ender Vendor, which has a small chance to spawn alongside Endermen. Water and rain will damage it, but it will not teleport like Endermen.
Like villagers, you can trade with the Ender Vendor. Additional trade options will unlock as you trade more. You can obtain Purpurium, and some trades require rated cards.
Obtained through trading with the Ender Vendor. Can be used to brew Luck Rating potions, make Perfect Buddy Steel Dust, and Purpurium Medal Tokens.
Used to place collected basic cards.
Obtained by collecting all types of cards in the basic pack. Grants a permanent Speed 1 buff when worn.
Right-click to view the collection progress of all cards, or hold any card in the off-hand and right-click to view the collection progress of its card pack.
Used to place collected Nether cards.
Used to place collected End cards.
ftbquests.chapter.10C0ECB494069482.title: Card Collection
ftbquests.chapter.112F5DB92B546247.quest: General way to increase luck value for Lucky Blocks:
Lucky Blocks that can be collected with Silk Touch can all increase luck value. You can collect them and check specific recipes in JEI.
ftbquests.chapter.112F5DB92B546247.title: &b☆Master Directory☆&r
ftbquests.chapter.1AC0F1AE8CC91A7A.quest: Here are items related to storage, to solve the problem of too many items to store.
3. Build tech storage in a safe place
Advantages: Unlimited range of use, unified management, small footprint.
Disadvantages: Complex crafting, requires energy.
Including personal storage, warehouse storage, and some automation (automation is not covered in detail here; please explore on your own).
Since monsters can dig blocks, you can choose one storage solution or use them flexibly:
1. Use backpack storage
Advantages: Simple and fast, no need to rummage through chests.
Disadvantages: Small capacity, supply items not nearby after death, &cBUG where the backpack gets stuck if too many items are stored&r.
2. Build chest storage in a safe place
Advantages: Cheap to make, easy to use, suitable for early game.
Disadvantages: Limited access range, large footprint, requires manual management (can be managed by maids).
Explanation
Chest Storage
{itemGroup.sophisticatedstorage}
Upgrade a furnace to a generator using reinforcement components, then open the furnace's &bleft&r configuration page and set the direction facing the device to &6Output&r.
Assemble &bStorage Elements&r and &bDisk Casings&r in a workbench, and place them in the &bDisk Drive&r.
It is recommended to add the &bSmoker Upgrade&r and use baked potatoes for power generation.
How to power the controller

A network only needs one controller. Open the controller interface to view the energy consumption of each device. Disks must be installed in the disk manager to use. Disk capacity is calculated by &bnumber of items&r. If you can't make large-capacity disks in early game, you can store items with small stacks but large quantities in the network, and items with large stacks in chests to save capacity.
Tech Storage
Only some important upgrades are placed here. For more, please check the recipes yourself.
Backpacks can be placed on the ground as chests by sneaking + right-clicking. Press B in the inventory to access them. They also work when installed in the accessory slot.
Personal Storage
Requires use with disk casings
Requires use with disk casings
Connect the wireless access point to the terminal. Open the wireless access point interface to view the range and install upgrades.
The wireless crafting terminal needs to be bound to the controller by sneaking + right-clicking.
Solution for being too far away or in a different dimension: Use a chunk loader.
There are also upgrades for this.
Each increases the range by 8 blocks.
Only some important upgrades are placed here. For more, please check the recipes yourself.
Mainly used to load chunks of the storage network to ensure the wireless terminal works properly.
New energy generator. Only consumes one mouse per 100 kilometers.
Alternative power generation method
The battery upgrade can convert part of the backpack's space into a battery. You can place the backpack on the ground by sneaking + right-clicking and use a generator to charge it.
How to power handheld wireless devices
ftbquests.chapter.1AC0F1AE8CC91A7A.title: Logistics System

The Vellium dimension may seem like a bright and peaceful place — but don't be deceived by its appearance. The strange Yellow One-eyed Beasts inhabiting here are deadly to players. If you act carelessly, you will despairingly get lost in the endless Fields of Fluffy Cloud in the lowlands.
1. Find the lucky blocks on the map

Source: Obtained by mining Tyrant Steel Ore
Source: Obtained by mining Slime Ore

ftbquests.chapter.2323EDC238E1D21A.quest: There are currently 2 ways to store experience. One is to use an Experience Tome, which can store up to level 30 experience at a time, suitable for early game. The other is to use the backpack's Experience Pump upgrade + Tank upgrade + Stack upgrade to store large amounts of experience for late game.

ftbquests.chapter.25EFA61D7D9572C4.quest: Fires lit TNT, which does not explode instantly.
Has a long reach distance, an early-game artifact.
Recommended to use together, but the harpoon can also be used alone.
Creepers will see you as one of their own.
Extremely powerful set buffs. With it as late-game god-tier equipment, you're basically fearless of invasions.
Boots grant a 1-minute flight buff when entering water, allowing you to create flight.
Boots can activate a 6*6*6 ocean domain, allowing swimming, equivalent to slow free flight.
The set has powerful inherent attributes, suitable as late-game equipment.
Right-click to fire water balloons and lightning.
Equivalent to elytra without needing fireworks. Press Y to soar once, effective multiple times. Can fly indefinitely.
With it, you gain the moist ability. Press G to launch.
Firing effect causes the target to briefly quickly, different from slow levitation.

Requires glass bottles and the Ability Steal enchantment.
ftbquests.chapter.2620CA9C0D7B5EA1.title: Rotating Lucky Block
ftbquests.chapter.26CBDB80E671D500.quest: Pour milk into a cauldron to make cheese.
First, corner the mouse, then drop cheese on the ground near it. After feeding 10 - 20 cheeses, the mouse can be tamed.
Right-click the mouse to open its inventory. Sneak-right-click the mouse to place it on your shoulder.
What? Mice can level up too?!
ftbquests.chapter.26CBDB80E671D500.title: Mouse Pet
ftbquests.chapter.285BBB7AC0649BDF.quest: Here is a monster compendium of non-critical monsters, for challenges.
Explanation
Some youkai from Gensokyo with amazing combat power. They can deal at most 1% of your maximum health in damage, and their attacks will penetrate your armor.
Touhou Faction

Creepers are a troublesome creature. They often appear in front of you unexpectedly and then ruin your belongings. They now also have the ability to launch themselves. Watch out for a Creeper mortar attack!
Creeper Faction
Usually, they only shoot with crossbows. You can directly approach them and dodge attacks with movement.
They can summon vexes that can pass through walls and fly around, and they also use magical attacks, which are quite difficult to deal with. However, they are one of the sources of totems of undying.
Pillagers with axes are fast; it is recommended to attack them from a distance.
Pillagers usually appear in raids or in outposts in the overworld, and they are numerous. Do not approach outposts without good equipment in the early stages.
Pillager Faction
Spiders have the ability to shoot webs. Don't think they only move slowly to attack you. Of course, they are also good mounts and occasionally bring a teammate to fight with you.
Spider Faction

Guardians and their family usually live in ocean monuments. They will lock onto players with lasers and deal damage. Players can avoid being locked by using blocks for isolation. Different guardians have slightly different abilities.
Guardian Faction
They usually only appear on pirate ships.
Although they have the same name, they are not bosses.
Formed when regular skeletons drown in water.
Witches in this world are not easy to deal with; they are masters of potions. It's best not to drag out the fight against them; try to use powerful attacks to end it quickly.
There are bosses for challenges from early to late stages, as well as some special creatures.
Other Factions
Appear during invasions.
Beware of the ghast version of bombers.
Skeletons usually attack with bows and arrows. With AI enhancement, they are all sharpshooters. Try to keep your distance and don't expose yourself in places where you can be ambushed easily.
Skeleton Faction
Zombies usually only attack at close range, but now they can use fishing rods to pull players; you have to be careful to dodge.
Zombie Faction
Yellow in color.
Spawn difficulty level: Normal
Boss in the Undead Legion invasion event.
Spawn difficulty level: Normal
Spawn difficulty level: Hard
Be careful of them when opening loot chests.
Spawn difficulty level: Normal
Boss in the Undead Legion invasion event.
Spawn difficulty level: Hard
Boss in the Undead Legion invasion event.
Spawn difficulty level: Master
This is a special faction, usually unlocked as the difficulty stage increases (not the difficulty value), and appears in the Undead Legion invasion event.
Manually triggered using the Undead Army Flag (only in the overworld).
&6First time entering another dimension: Unlocks Hard mode&r
&cWhen the Ender Dragon is killed: Unlocks Expert mode&r
Undead Legion
Slimes are monsters with different sizes. When a slime larger than size 1 is killed, it splits into smaller ones.
Slime Faction

ftbquests.chapter.3E17CA3251E05EA9.quest: The accessories above have a chance to be obtained from different loot chests, or randomly obtained by killing mimics. Monsters that spawn normally may also carry accessories.

The ones on the left are growable relics. Press Shift to view the conditions for obtaining &brelic experience&r, manually upgrade skills, or spend &bplayer experience&r to reset quality. Relics have a chance to be obtained from different loot chests.

The accessories on the right will have &baccessory slot&r. If you obtain &baccessory parts&r in survival, you can place them in the &bcrafting table&r to install them into accessories with empty slots. These accessories are generally obtained by killing creatures.

The accessories below are synthesized step by step from basic accessories. You need to first make a &bcraftsman's workshop&r to synthesize basic accessories. For the source of accessories, you can click on the accessory to see the JEI description.
Can be obtained with a chance while fishing.
Can be obtained with a chance when harvesting crops.
Can be obtained with a chance when tools break.
Can be obtained with a chance when opening chests.
Can be obtained with a chance when harvesting crops.
Can be obtained with a chance while fishing.
Can be obtained with a chance when taming animals.
These accessories can be obtained directly through synthesis.
Advanced accessories need to be synthesized through this.
Can be obtained with a chance during trading.
Can be obtained with a chance when sleeping.
Can be obtained with a chance when breeding.
Can be obtained with a chance when mining.

ftbquests.chapter.41EAB6A8874B5DCC.quest: Click to jump to the dependencies:

The BloodForest is a forest full of thorns and blood. If the player is not wearing suitable armor, the thorns alone can tear the player to pieces. There are also large lava lakes here, and a hidden room is hidden in the lava lake, which can only be reached by finding the portal.
1. Find lucky blocks in the map
2. Find the portal in the magma lake
Source: Obtained by mining flame jade ore
Can be obtained in chests in some dungeons in the Blood Forest.
ftbquests.chapter.41EAB6A8874B5DCC.title: Blood Forest [&680~100&r,&e32&r]
ftbquests.chapter.440598218D3432C3.quest: Apotheosis is an equipment enhancement system that can even support the Apotheosis of firearms, which can greatly improve your combat effectiveness.
Special note: In the later stages, firearms can only exert obvious power with magic bullet affixes, and melee weapons need percentage damage affixes to deal high damage.
Explanation
Gems can be crushed into gem powder through an anvil.
Anvils now accept splitting, disassembling, and durability enchantments.
Damaged anvils can be repaired into anvils using iron blocks, which costs 5 levels of experience.
Apotheosis adopts a new enchantment system:
Based on the original enchantment to increase the upper limit, and improve the enchantment level by replacing advanced bookshelves.
Eterna: Determines the maximum enchantment level that the enchantment table can enchant. Maximum enchantment level = Eterna × 2.
Quantization: Fluctuates your final enchantment level.
Arcanum: Determines the probability of 'rare enchantments' appearing.
Calibration: Changes the minimum value of the final enchantment level affected by quantization fluctuations.
Enchantment clues: The number of enchantments that can be previewed.
The forging table can be used to inlay gems.

These are the most basic bookshelves, and you can see that their maximum Eterna is only 15, which means you can only place up to 15 to reach the upper limit. To continue upgrading, you need more advanced bookshelves.
Here begins the explanation of the bookshelf upgrade route
Bookshelf
The left 3 types of bookshelves can be obtained by opening the Wither Treasure Bag dropped by killing the Wither.
The right 3 types of bookshelves can be obtained by opening the Ancient Guardian Treasure Bag dropped by killing the Ancient Guardian.
Can recycle many items and decompose gems into gem powder.

The salvaging table can convert affixed equipment into 1-4 treasure materials. The type of treasure material depends on the equipment's rarity and its remaining durability. When the remaining durability is low, the maximum output quantity will decrease, but it will output at least 1 even if the remaining durability is very low.
After obtaining a Eterna 30 bookshelf, you can try to obtain it through infusion.
After obtaining a Eterna 40 bookshelf, you can try to obtain it through infusion.
This is currently the highest Eterna achievable through synthesis; higher Eterna need to be obtained through special means.
Can be obtained through the Ender Dragon Treasure Bag.
Can be obtained through the Ender Dragon Treasure Bag.
This is currently the maximum Eterna bookshelf you can obtain.
Used to control specific infusion conditions or enchantment effects.
Used to control specific infusion conditions or enchantment effects.
Can be obtained through the Raid Treasure Bag.
Used to control specific infusion conditions or enchantment effects.
Can be obtained through the Raid Treasure Bag.
Used to strengthen gems.
Place gem powder, gem, and treasure material from left to right respectively, and place 1 gem the same as the one in the middle above in the lower grid.
Can be obtained through the Fisherman's Treasure Bag.
Can be obtained through the Raid Treasure Bag.
Requires 22.5 Eterna.
Requires 30 Eterna.

The reforging table is a block that changes equipment affixes. Its usage and mechanism are similar to the enchantment table, but it does not use lapis lazuli when used. Instead, it uses treasure materials and new runes, and there is no need to place bookshelves around it.
Supports a maximum rarity of Mythic.
Supports a maximum rarity of Ancient.
Supports a maximum rarity of Arcane.
Used to edit affixes of affixed items.
Consumes 2 Sigil of Enhancement to strengthen a selected affix once, and consumes 1 Sigil of Enhancement to refresh a selected affix.
ftbquests.chapter.440598218D3432C3.title: Apotheosis Master
ftbquests.chapter.4428548C42F3D842.quest: Click to jump to the dependencies:

The Glowshroom Forest is full of glowing mushrooms, but be careful, not all mushrooms will just stay in place and welcome guests. This dimension is also home to stinging Jellyfish and Spore Mines. Spore Mines may seem harmless, but if you accidentally get close to them, they will explode without warning. Of course, there are countless towers and dungeons waiting for players to explore here.
1. Find lucky blocks in the map
Used to convert blue jade into experience
Killing acid snails will generate snail acid, which can be collected by right-clicking with a containment box.
Source: Obtained by mining garnet ore
Source: Obtained by mining blue jade ore
Source: Obtained by mining pyrite ore
Source: Obtained by mining ghost alloy ore
Toxic spores can be obtained from underwater dungeon loot blocks.
ftbquests.chapter.4428548C42F3D842.title: Glowshroom Forest [&660~80&r,&e8&r]
ftbquests.chapter.44EC5D5BBD1E393F.title: &aShop&r
ftbquests.chapter.455423C6CFEB7C54.quest: In Flesh & Steel v4, players usually need to look for lucky blocks everywhere, but for adventures, sometimes several fixed habitats are needed to deal with invasions, etc., or to transport villagers obtained from lucky blocks, because they are easily attacked by monsters. At this time, some transportation equipment is needed.

Teleportation steles are tools in the game convenient for long-distance travel. They usually spawn in the wild or in villages. There are 2 types of steles: ordinary steles need to be activated and can only be seen by oneself; shared steles can be used to share waypoints with other players.
Sneak + right-click with an empty hand to modify the name of the stele's location.
In addition to being used for sailing, it can also be used to trap some creatures.
For players, they can right-click the stele to open the GUI. If they want to transport other creatures, they need to use this.
At least 2 are needed to use. After placing, exchange their resonance shards to connect the 2 steles.
ftbquests.chapter.455423C6CFEB7C54.title: Transportation System
ftbquests.chapter.4986922C36E26385.quest: Click to jump to the dependencies:
Void Infusion is an effect that most creatures and players accumulate over time in the void.
As the player's infusion value increases, the maximum health will decrease, but the player's void damage and void defense will increase, up to 10 points.

When non-void creatures accumulate a certain amount of infusion value, they will drop void essence when killed. When the infusion value reaches the maximum, the creature will take 1024 points of void damage. (Including players)
Darkness
The void dimension is unnaturally dark, with reduced light brightness and limited visibility (almost only 2-3 blocks). Night vision (including gamma value) does not work.
Equipping equipment with &bvoid visibility&r attribute can improve vision.
Death Prevention
Players are favored by the void dimension. When taking fatal damage, the player will not die. The player will be teleported back to the overworld's spawn point by the void, with 1 health left.
Legend has it that there is a huge unexplored dimension beneath the void——the Void World.
It is filled with a huge army of void creatures, accompanied by void energy that corrupts everything, serving their master, the Void God XIA.
Survival goals:
1. Find lucky blocks in the map
Paranoia

Players naturally accumulate this in the void dimension over time. Various armors can reduce the accumulation speed of paranoia. Eating nether void fruits will increase the accumulation of paranoia, and eating overworld void fruits will reduce it.
Voidic Infusion
CLICK HERE
&cRequires completion of dependencies&r
Void Adventure
Dropped by killing the dependencies boss.
In the &bVoid Infusion&r state, killing original monsters in the void dimension has a 66% chance to drop (e.g., zombies).
In the void dimension, right-clicking bedrock with it can convert it into void crystal ore.
When working, it can reduce the void infusion accumulation value of all creatures within a 2-chunk radius.
Each 1 mb of void crystal liquid consumed allows it to work for 100 ticks.
Obtained by throwing {item.voidscape.strange_pearl} at an end crystal.
Right-click {block.voidscape.antirock} with {item.voidscape.astral_shards}.
{block.voidscape.cracked_astralrock}
{block.voidscape.antirock}

When the player's paranoia state in the void dimension accumulates to the maximum, a corrupted chess piece is generated, and then the mini-game stage begins. The corrupted chess piece will be generated in a random direction 100 blocks away from the player. When generated, the player's view is forced to lock onto that direction. Then the boss keeps flying towards the player, and if the player deals damage to it before contact, the boss will teleport 100 blocks away.
One of the ways to get out of the void dimension.
Obtained by killing the corrupted chess piece.
Right-click {entity.voidscape.null_servant} to transform into a boss.
Right-click {entity.voidscape.null_servant} to transform into a boss.
Right-click {entity.voidscape.null_servant} to transform into a boss.
Dropped by killing the dependencies boss.
Dropped by killing the dependencies boss.
ftbquests.chapter.4986922C36E26385.title: Void World [&c150~250&r,&e100&r]
ftbquests.chapter.4B0D73789A6AE9BF.title: {block.lucky.elefire_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.4B7B453A2454DCF8.quest: Click to jump to the dependencies:
The dimension consists of three parts: jungle, beach, and ocean, with large and small islands in the shape of cheese holes generated.
Many broken marble cheese buildings have been additionally generated, all showing the prosperity of the former Ratlantis, and wild Ratlantean, pirate rats, and Ratlantean spirits spawn here.
Survival goals:
1. Find lucky blocks in the map
CLICK HERE
&cRequires completion of dependencies&r
Ratlantis
You need to open the entrance to the Twilight Forest here.

The new Ratlantis tribe has extremely high health, extremely fast movement speed, and extremely small hitboxes. They will not only attack players but also wander around and attack all original creatures.
Use a cage to trap wild Ratlantean, and then the summoned new Ratlantean cannot break through the cage.
Roam in the air and are 'neutral creatures'. They will actively attack players.
Hostile to all non-Ratlantean creatures, will immediately attack players and overworld creatures, and can destroy blocks weaker than obsidian (can occasionally destroy obsidian)

Its prototype comes from the legend of The Flying Dutchman, and some plots in the 'Pirates of the Caribbean' series are also derived from this. The Flying Dutchman is a legendary ghost ship that can never return. In the mod, Duchman is changed to Duchrat. In addition, in some versions of the legend, the Flying Dutchman was banned from berthing by all ports because of a severe plague on board, so it can never dock.
Right-click the air defense siren.
Air Defense Siren
Air Defense Siren Runway
Right-click the bell.
Ghost Bell
Ghost Rat Pirate Ship
Negative and Negative Make Positive
Refer to the construction method of iron golems.
ftbquests.chapter.4B7B453A2454DCF8.title: Ratlantis [&c100~120&r,&e64&r]
ftbquests.chapter.530029FE1468C705.title: {block.lucky.eleice_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.53D405567523440B.title: {block.lucky.elergy_lucky_block}

ftbquests.chapter.5BB152DB79EC9A2B.quest: The Nether is a closed and dangerous dimension filled with fire, lava, fungal vegetation, and many hostile creatures. It is a world existing in a different dimension from the overworld and is also a cave dimension.
1. Find lucky blocks in the map
3. Defeat the Wither to obtain the Demon Heart
Used to summon the Wither Skeleton Commander.
Place 3 cores as shown on the left, then activate with a redstone signal, such as a lever.
ftbquests.chapter.5BB152DB79EC9A2B.title: Nether [&a20~30&r,&e1&r]
ftbquests.chapter.5F803EBD5F698F2B.title: {block.lucky.summer_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.5FDBC52B8B92FA6A.quest: Used to find nearby villager trades.
Through villager trading, you can easily obtain some materials, weapons, enchantments, etc.
Please pay more attention to wandering traders, as they will sell some hard-to-obtain items.
ftbquests.chapter.5FDBC52B8B92FA6A.title: Trading System
ftbquests.chapter.6219C60DCF76D0C0.quest: Maids can not only help you fight but also do many things. Here's how to get a capable maid.
&cNote the difference between maids and maid fairies; only maids can be tamed with cakes. Maid fairies are hostile creatures.&r
Press the X key to have an AI conversation with nearby maids (requires AI conversation function to be configured).
Hold a saddle to pick up maids.
Positioning mode explanation:

Maids will look for specified structures or the player's spawn point based on the item in their hand (currently supports compasses, treasure maps, maps, ender eyes). If the maid and the player are on the same vehicle (currently only supports &bbrooms&r), the player can press the specified key (default is V) to let the maid control or partially control the vehicle.
Touhou Maid
Infrastructure
Various accessories to enhance the maid. These are essential if you want to cultivate a powerful maid.
Maid Accessories
Used to unlock the maid's inventory space.
Maid Backpack
Various items to find the maid. If you accidentally lose your maid, you can try these.
Where is the Maid
Items used to increase the maid's favorability.
Entertainment Facilities
Kappa's compass is used to set the maid's working and resting locations.
Practical Gadgets
Please build the altar according to the tutorial book. Remember that you need enough P points to synthesize.
Tutorial book location: Manual -> Overview -> Multi-block Altar. Click the eye in the lower left corner of the structure diagram in the tutorial book to toggle the structure projection display.
Build the Altar
Hold it to view the player's P points (upper left corner). It is also an essential tool for building the altar.
{item.touhou_little_maid.entity_id_copy}:

Right-click a creature to copy its ID. If you don't understand what an ID is, just think of it as a tag. When the maid switches to attack mode, there is a maid attack list in the second tab above where you can configure the list of creatures. Paste the copied tag into the input box and click add to configure the behavior towards this creature. By default, it automatically attacks all hostile creatures. If you don't want the maid to attack a certain creature, set it to neutral or friendly.
{item.touhou_little_maid.chair_show}:
The cushion can be used for the maid to fish. You can change its appearance as you like. If the model is too large, you need to use the cushion display to find the collision box.

Right-click to gain P points, which are used for altar synthesis. Generally, there's no need to use a lot. The maximum P points a player can store is 5. Excess points need to be stored in &b{block.touhou_little_maid.maid_beacon}&r.

If your maid accidentally dies, there are two ways to revive her. One is to use {block.touhou_little_maid.altar}, and the other is to use {block.touhou_little_maid.shrine} to revive the maid in the film. Note that it will also reduce the player's health to 1 point. Don't do this in a dangerous environment.
Can be used to recall the maid into a photo when there is no soul charm.
Can be used with photos to make maid statues.
The way to obtain the figure is to use a flint and steel or similar ignition tool to light a fire around the statue, and you will get the corresponding figure after a while.
Observe the Maid Statue
ftbquests.chapter.6219C60DCF76D0C0.title: Maid Trainer
ftbquests.chapter.62F087BC1FD6A1E1.title: {block.lucky.flesh_and_steel_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.6944C626EC53F52F.title: Gradient Lucky Block
ftbquests.chapter.694F71CAEC24AB8E.quest: The Overworld is the dimension where the player starts their game journey, i.e., the player's default spawn point. The environment is similar to Earth in reality, with dense forests, vast plains, endless oceans, and towering mountains.
1. Find lucky blocks in the map and use silk touch to get some lucky blocks
3. Find the castle and get the admission ticket to the Mushroom Kingdom
Can absorb a large range of water blocks.
Arrows used for Aquatic Bow, Water Bow, and Water Triple Longbow.
Sometimes you will see a ship on the sea. Be careful of the pirates on it, but the ship contains key materials for synthesizing the Water Lucky Block.
Also, don't forget to search the barrel under the seat in the captain's cabin.
The habitat of the Warden, along with dangers, there are various rich treasure chests.
Right-click the painting on the wall with [{block.super_block_world.power_star}] to activate the portal to the Mushroom Kingdom.

Sometimes you will see altar-like structures on the sea surface or even on land. It's better not to get close in the early survival stage. A lot of moisture will generate nearby. If you are accidentally hit, you will get the drowning effect, which will make you unable to breathe on land.
A small structure usually located on the seabed, with a certain number of Tritons nearby.
Players can commit three levels of crimes: minor, moderate, and severe.
Crimes are only recorded if seen by a witness.
The detection distance of witnesses is affected by the player's stealth level — sneaking, low light levels, and invisibility potions can help players avoid being detected.
Reputation (hold an emerald towards a villager to check):
Hostile: Iron golems will protect villagers and attack the player
Rejected: Villagers refuse to trade with the player
Accepted: Minor crimes can be ignored
Respected: Moderate crimes can be ignored
Each crime will reduce the reputation of all villagers who witnessed the crime towards the player.
Revered: Severe crimes can be ignored

Committing crimes or attacking/killing villagers will reduce the player's reputation. Players can increase their reputation by defeating raids, giving gifts, and through vanilla methods (such as trading or curing zombie villagers).
Sneak and use an emerald to give it to a villager to increase the villager's reputation towards the player.
Severe crimes will reduce reputation to the point where iron golems attack the player.
If iron golems and guard villagers witness the player committing moderate or severe crimes, they will directly attack the player.
Only actions within 'protected' structures are considered crimes. By default, 'protected' structures only refer to villages.
Minor: Breaking crops, hay bales, lanterns, campfires, kicking villagers out of beds
Moderate: Breaking chests, barrels, villager work blocks, beds; opening chests, barrels; sleeping in beds claimed by villagers
The Black Reaper will keep a certain distance from the player or other entities and will not attack the target directly, but will surround the target with summons.
As an important piece of armor, the shield can help you resist some damage, especially explosions.
Right-click the soul jar and combine it with a shield in the crafting table, or use it directly in the off-hand.
The full set also adds +20 maximum health, a godly set for the early game.
Set effect: None. Any piece can immune to freezing effect
Can be used to activate talismans.
Hold the talisman and right-click to consume and activate it.
Grants Strength III for 60 seconds when used.
Grants Resistance II for 60 seconds when used.
Grants Speed III for 60 seconds when used.
Grants Invisibility III for 60 seconds when used.
Grants Moderate Rage for 60 seconds when used (this effect actually immediately grants Regeneration IV for 2 seconds and Strength II + Speed II for 60 seconds).

In the early game, you might consider making various foods to increase your maximum health. Of course, you can choose relevant cooking options in the maid's working mode to help you complete all kinds of delicious food.
A structure on the seabed, relatively rare. You can get the Kraken by opening lucky blocks.
ftbquests.chapter.694F71CAEC24AB8E.title: Overworld [&a0~20&r,&e0&r]
ftbquests.chapter.6E95D032C9AE2485.title: {block.lucky.pink_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.74FA830B140BD439.title: {block.lucky.desert_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.79EAFAE51BE78162.title: {block.lucky.fire_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.7BC2CF56DBB964D2.title: {block.lucky.morbius_lucky_block}
ftbquests.chapter.7FA60382A3541CB2.quest: Here are some relatively special foods, used for collection or survival.
Eating &e5&r new types of food you haven't eaten before can increase your health by &e2&r points. You can check the food manual for details.
A magical flower pot that can make crops mature quickly. Try planting beet seeds, carrots, and potatoes on it, and you will get different harvests.
ftbquests.chapter.7FA60382A3541CB2.title: Gourmet
ftbquests.chapter.blockluckycheese_lucky: In addition to luck-based drops, it can also be obtained through trading with villagers.
ftbquests.chapter.ddebugr.quest1.descrip: As the name suggests, it refers to whether to keep the inventory after death without having to pick up items from the remains.
ftbquests.chapter.ddebugr.quest2.descrip: Here you can choose whether you need an invasion or cancel the current invasion.
ftbquests.chapter.ddebugr.quest3.descrip: Difficulty reset: Set the current player's difficulty value to the initial 0
Kill all entities: Kill all non-player entities (&cUse with caution!&r)
Clear drops: Remove unwanted dropped items.
ftbquests.chapter.ddebugr.quest4.descrip: Whether monsters will destroy blocks, such as monsters mining blocks, Creeper explosion prevention, etc.
ftbquests.chapter.ddebugr.title: &dSystem Settings&r [OP Only]
